description_long: This is a modern, rectangular microwave oven with a bold red and black color scheme. The front features a large, flat black door panel with a vertical red handle on the right side, and a digital control panel with a display and several touch buttons. The top, sides, and back are finished in a glossy red, giving the appliance a striking, contemporary appearance. The control panel is located on the right side of the front face, with clear labeling and a digital clock display. The door appears to be solid with no window, and there are no visible vents on the exterior surfaces. The overall design is sleek, with smooth, hard surfaces and minimal external detailing.
description: A sleek, red and black microwave oven with a vertical red handle, digital control panel, and a solid door with no window.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the solid red side and the recessed door frame.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, glossy red surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Front-right view similar to view 0, highlighting the red side and the door frame.
description_view_3: Direct front view showing the black door, vertical red handle, digital control panel, and display.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, yellow-green logo is present in the top left corner of the front panel, with additional small red text centered below the door.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top, followed by a column of labeled touch buttons for various functions, and two larger buttons at the bottom for 'Stop' and 'Start'.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical, rectangular red bar located on the right edge of the front door, extending nearly the full height of the door and made of glossy plastic or painted metal.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any exterior surface.
